improvement.summary: Adds a credential-free exact-commit workflow that validates Cloudflare environment declarations, executes deterministic preflight tests, emits privacy-bounded evidence, records SHA-256 digests, and uploads an immutable run manifest before any secret-bearing deployment is attempted.
properties: runs three dependency-free Node contract suites
fails closed when workflow environment declarations drift
does not inspect or upload credential values
states that infrastructure evidence is not scientific or medical truth

verification.workflow_run_query: no workflow run returned at recording time

limits: Does not prove the cloudflare-research environment exists.
Does not prove required secrets are installed or valid.
Does not prove Cloudflare API authorization.
Does not prove deployment, hostname resolution, or served identity.
Does not establish scientific or medical truth.
falsification_route: Reject the workflow slice if an exact-commit run does not pass all tests, if checkout SHA differs from github.sha, if generated evidence lacks matching repository and commit provenance, if artifact digests fail, or if any credential value appears in retained artifacts.
